title: Road to 5 Million Tokens: Breaking Barriers in Long Context Training — Max Ryabinin, Together AI
summary: Max Ryabinin presents a full stack of techniques for training LLMs with extremely long contexts up to 5 million tokens, including fully sharded data parallelism, DeepSpeed Ulysses context parallelism, activation checkpointing, CPU offloading, and chunked sequence training. The novel contribution Untied Ulysses further optimizes context parallelism by chunking attention heads and reusing buffers across iterations, achieving memory reductions with negligible throughput loss.
